title: Knysna Cavaliers defeat Pacaltsdorp United
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The defending champions, Pacaltsdorp United (182 all out), suffered a 40-run defeat against Knysna Cavaliers (228/8). For Cavaliers, Ruan Terblanche posted an elegant 79.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The defending champions, Pacaltsdorp United (182 all out), suffered a 40-run defeat against Knysna Cavaliers (228/8). For Cavaliers, Ruan Terblanche posted an elegant 79."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex, on Saturday, joined Union Stars I at the top of the Six Gun Grill premier league competition table. The home side (244 all out), at D’Almeida, recorded a bonus point 59 runs victory, against the visitors from Oudtshoorn (185 all out) to move to 44 points and join Union Stars at the top of the table.","html":"Sussex, on Saturday, joined Union Stars I at the top of the Six Gun Grill premier league competition table. The home side (244 all out), at D’Almeida, recorded a bonus point 59 runs victory, against the visitors from Oudtshoorn (185 all out) to move to 44 points and join Union Stars at the top of the table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Sussex, Hanno Kotze, a former Garden Route Badgers professional player, posted the highest individual score of the season – 162. Corné Kennedy (4/38) for Union Stars and Rowan Groenewald (4/61 for Sussex) both bagged four wickets.","html":"For Sussex, Hanno Kotze, a former Garden Route Badgers professional player, posted the highest individual score of the season – 162. Corné Kennedy (4/38) for Union Stars and Rowan Groenewald (4/61 for Sussex) both bagged four wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George (195) defeated Union Strs II (138) by 57 runs at the Bridgton Sports Grounds for a bonus point victory. For George De Wet Steyn scored a vital half-century (54) and Shelby Lindeque (4/25) impressed with the ball. Adriaan van der Merwe (60), played a gutsy knock for Union Stars.","html":"George (195) defeated Union Strs II (138) by 57 runs at the Bridgton Sports Grounds for a bonus point victory. For George De Wet Steyn scored a vital half-century (54) and Shelby Lindeque (4/25) impressed with the ball. Adriaan van der Merwe (60), played a gutsy knock for Union Stars."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecards are:","html":"The summarised scorecards are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers vs Pacaltsdorp United","html":"Knysna Cavaliers vs Pacaltsdorp United"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers 222/8 - 49 overs (Ruan Terblanche 79, AB van der Walt 33, JP Ellis 27, Gert Swart 2/22, Warren Bell 2/40).","html":"Knysna Cavaliers 222/8 - 49 overs (Ruan Terblanche 79, AB van der Walt 33, JP Ellis 27, Gert Swart 2/22, Warren Bell 2/40)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United 182 all out - 46.5 overs (Randy Wesso 49, Anoxolo Khitshini 36, Gert Swart 30, Pieter Stuurman 18*, Francois Bonthuys 2/32, Charl Francois Marais 2/33, Wessel Croukamp 2/37).","html":"Pacaltsdorp United 182 all out - 46.5 overs (Randy Wesso 49, Anoxolo Khitshini 36, Gert Swart 30, Pieter Stuurman 18*, Francois Bonthuys 2/32, Charl Francois Marais 2/33, Wessel Croukamp 2/37)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 40 runs.","html":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 40 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex vs Union Stars I","html":"Sussex vs Union Stars I"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex 244 all out - 45.2 overs (Hanno Kotze 162, Corne Kennedy 4/38, Lee Henry Meyer 3/45, Merlin Masimela 2/40).","html":"Sussex 244 all out - 45.2 overs (Hanno Kotze 162, Corne Kennedy 4/38, Lee Henry Meyer 3/45, Merlin Masimela 2/40)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars 185 all out - 41.2 overs (Merlin Masimela 43, Thurston Murphy 25, Grant Esau 20, Corné Kennedy 20, Rowan Groenewald 4/61, Heath Richards 2/28).","html":"Union Stars 185 all out - 41.2 overs (Merlin Masimela 43, Thurston Murphy 25, Grant Esau 20, Corné Kennedy 20, Rowan Groenewald 4/61, Heath Richards 2/28)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex won by 59 runs.","html":"Sussex won by 59 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars II vs George","html":"Union Stars II vs George"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George 195 all out - 49.6 overs (De Wet Steyn 54, Khwezi Gumede 42, Lifa Ntanzi 3/38, James Bruiners 2/19, Shannon Opperman 2/37).","html":"George 195 all out - 49.6 overs (De Wet Steyn 54, Khwezi Gumede 42, Lifa Ntanzi 3/38, James Bruiners 2/19, Shannon Opperman 2/37)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union stars II 138 all out - 41.2 overs (Adriaan van der Merwe 60, Shelby Lindique 4/25, PJ Carstens 3/31, Jarren Bacher 2/33).","html":"Union stars II 138 all out - 41.2 overs (Adriaan van der Merwe 60, Shelby Lindique 4/25, PJ Carstens 3/31, Jarren Bacher 2/33)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George won by 57 runs.","html":"George won by 57 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
